def validate_batch(items):
    for item in items:
        if not item.get("name"):
            raise ValueError(f"Missing name for item {item.get('id')}")
        if item.get("quantity", 0) < 0:
            raise ValueError(f"Negative quantity for item {item['id']}")
        if item.get("price", 0) < 0:
            raise ValueError(f"Negative price for item {item['id']}")
    return items

def process_orders(orders):
    results = []
    for order in orders:
        validated = validate_single_order(order)
        results.append(validated)
    return results

def validate_single_order(order):
    if not order.get("customer_id"):
        raise ValueError("Missing customer_id")
    return order
